code_scanning_alert.official: GitHub App must have at least read-level access for the 'Code scanning alerts' repository permission
code_scanning_alert.note: Webhook requires permission, underlying code scanning feature requires GHAS for private repos

secret_scanning_alert.note: Underlying secret scanning feature requires GHAS for private repos

organization.official: Requires at least read-level access for the 'Members' organization permission

note: GHAS requirements correctly annotated at feature level (lines 249-250)
